name: @multiarc/ace_heddle
description: Custom Ace build (https://github.com/ajaxorg/ace) to support Heddle template language
author: Aliaksandr Kukrash

scripts.generate: java -jar antlr-4.13.1-complete.jar -Dlanguage=JavaScript HeddleLexer.g4 HeddleParser.g4 -o js -lib js -package Heddle.Language && node propagate_js.js
